pm_internal_review.notes: PM correction after founder review: the IA can be retained, but all high-fidelity candidate screens fail product taste and cannot be treated as a viable product direction.

pmo_internal_review.notes: PMO correction: this pass still looks visually unacceptable and must not unlock test-plan/dev. PMO should not mark it as suitable for founder review again without a stronger external-grade design source.

notes: Founder rejected the high-fidelity shell candidate as visually unacceptable. Keep only the broad IA intent; do not use any current generated screens as implementation target.
reject_note: Founder rejected high-fidelity shell candidate: all screens still fail product taste and visual quality; PM/PMO gate must not treat this as acceptable
